reasoning: Reviewed the full Order Notes / Comments History. Internal staff notes clearly document this as a VIP customer exception. Although the purchase is outside the standard 30-day refund policy, the customer contacted support at day 32 and the delay was caused by our team. Customer has strong lifetime value (42 orders, $6,200 LTV) with minimal prior refunds. Staff recommendation explicitly advises approval to retain the relationship. Based on complete context and internal guidance, the refund should be approved.
